title: How to create activity assigned to someone else
excerpt: I’m using Monday’s basic CRM template. When I click into the account or contact, it brings up their item page with the Email and Activities box. When I add an activity, it automatically (I dont know where this automation…

posts.author: joshuams (Josh)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m using Monday’s basic CRM template. When I click into the account or contact, it brings up their item page with the Email and Activities box. When I add an activity, it automatically (I dont know where this automation is) creates an item on my activity board with me as the owner.

Does anyone know how I would go about adding an activity that designates someone else as the owner?

posts.author: InsulationGod (Joshua Friddle)
posts.cookedHtml: Where you able to find out anything. stuck on this
